[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110 2
1 1111100 5
2 0011101 4
3 0010001 2
4 0101110 4
5 1011011 5
6 0000010 1
7 0001101 3

01 10 1011001 4
12 21 1111010 5
23 32 0111110 5
34 43 1010101 4

67 76 0001100 2
70 07 1001010 3

13 31 1000100 2
24 42 1101011 5
35 53 0010000 1
46 64 0001110 3

71 17 0010011 3

14 41 0010001 2 match 3

36 63 1011011 5 match 5
47 74 0000010 1 match 6
50 05 0001101 3 match 7
61 16 0011111 5
72 27 1101001 4

04 40 1001000 2
15 51 1010100 3
26 62 1100101 4
37 73 1010111 5
